arts.ttl: Juventus eye Skriniar, PSG Interested in Fagioli
arts.sum: Juventus are actively seeking a central defender for the upcoming January transfer window, with Milan Skriniar emerging as the top target. The 30-year-old Slovak international, formerly of Inter Milan, is currently under contract with Paris Saint-Germain until June 2028. Despite his lucrative contract, which sees him earn approximately 8 million euros net per season plus bonuses, Skriniar has struggled to secure regular playing time under coach Luis Enrique. The player has already expressed his willingness to return to Italy, preferably not on a short-term six-month loan deal. Calciomercato report how, In a related development, PSG have shown interest in Juventus The post Juventus eye Skriniar, PSG Interested in Fagioli appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Farmers, local beers & a three-day journey - watching Estonia away
arts.sum: Azerbaijan away proves to be a great adventure for Englishman Mark Corbett as he cheers on Estonia in a Nations League tie.
